title: Boolean expressions of exceptions should not be used in except statements
description: Avoid using boolean expressions in exception handling. This can lead to unintended behavior.
message: Avoid using boolean expressions in except statements
recommendation: Refactor the code to use explicit exceptions

noncompliant.description: Incorrect use of boolean expression in except statement

compliant.description: Correct use of explicit exception in except statement

why_is_this_an_issue: Boolean expressions in exception handling can lead to unintended behavior and make the code harder to read and maintain.
how_to_fix: Refactor the code to use explicit exceptions.
